title: philadelphus kunmingensis var. kunmingensis
intro: Philadelphus kunmingensis var. kunmingensis, also known as Kunming Mock Orange, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the family Hydrangeaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Kunming Mock Orange include reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory, gastrointestinal, and circulatory problems.
